2025 Threshold Summer Meeting in Snoqualmie, WA

Join us in Snoqualmie, WA for Threshold Foundation's Summer Retreat!

By Threshold Foundation

Location

Salish Lodge & Spa

6501 Railroad Avenue Snoqualmie, WA 98065

Refund Policy

No Refunds

About this event

Join us in Snoqualmie, WA for a memorable Summer Meeting


The closest airport is Seattle-Tacoma International Airport and is an approximate 40-minute taxi ride to the hotel. The meeting officially begins with a provided dinner at 6pm local time on Wednesday, June 11 and concludes with closing circle at around noon local time on Sunday, June 15. PNM orientation is expected to begin between 9-10am on the 11th and ends that afternoon around 4pm ET after break for lunch. Pre-meetings are scheduled and unique to each funding circle, please contact Carolyn at carolyn@thresholdfoundation.org for more information.

Registration Fees

To pay by phone, check, or wire/ach, please email isaac@thresholdfoundation.org or call (510) 697-0117. If you pay by check or ACH, you will save the additional fees charged on Eventbrite and the credit card processing fees charged to Threshold.

Main Meeting Price (+$200 pre-meeting pricing)

Registration fees are discounted for those that register early.

  • $2,195 (Purchase by January 3)
  • $2,395 (Purchase by February 28)
  • $2,595 (Purchase by April 30)
  • $2,695 (Purchased between April 30 and June)

Book Your Room

To book a room, please email molly.wyrsch@salishlodge.com and copy isaac@thresholdfoundation.org with your preferred dates. Threshold's room block has officially sold out, but a handful of rooms at the hotel currently remain. The most common room reservation pattern is arriving Tuesday, June 10 and departing Sunday, June 15 for a total of five nights.

The entire meeting is open to all current Donuts and invited Prospective New Members. All attendees must pay a conference fee (here) and for their hotel room (direct through the hotel).

Virtual Participation & Community Day

TBD

Is there a COVID safety policy?

Threshold’s 2025 Summer Meeting's health and safety protocols follow the guidance of both the CDC and local and state health authorities. In addition, we request that all attendees test prior to their travel to the meeting to further protect the health and safety of all guests.

Refund Policy

Your registration is 100% refundable for up to one week after purchase up until April 30, 2025. After April 30, 2025 your registration is 100% refundable for 24 hours after purchase. After those allowable refund windows, your registration is no longer refundable, however, we can convert your registration fee if you are unable to attend to a "General Operations" donation earmarked for the meetings so your contribution then becomes tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law to Threshold Foundation, a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization with Federal Tax Identification Number 13-3028214.

Agenda Committee

TBD

Organized by

Threshold Foundation

Threshold is a community of individuals united by our commitment to create a just, joyful, and generative world. We are a multi-generational membership organization devoted to aligning our resources with our values while fostering a fertile training ground for the full and authentic expression of our passions and purpose.

Organizer website
From $213.59
